LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GMAC MORTGAGE LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. OVERRULED AS THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FIRST, 3RD. AND 4TH. CAUSES OF ACTION. FOR THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION (WRONGFUL FORECLOSURE) PLAINTIFF MUST STATE FACTS SHOWING THAT THE FORECLOSURE WAS WRONGFUL AND MUST ALLEGE TENDER. FOR THE 3RD. CAUSE OF ACTION . (VIOLATIONS OF THE UCL) PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE WHICH PRONG HE ASSERTS THE CAUSE OF ACTION UNDER AND DESCRIBE WITH REASONABLE PARTICULARITY THE FACTS SUPPORTING THE ALLEGED VIOLATION. FOR THE 4TH. CAUSE OF ACTION (QUIET TITLE) PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE TENDER AND THE TITLE OF PLAINTIFF AS TO WHICH DETERMINATION IS SOUGHT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: MARIA VISCIO, CSR #12353

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GMAC MORTGAGE, LLC'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS MODIFIED: DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 1ST, 2ND, 4TH & 5TH CAUSES OF ACTION. THE ALLEGATIONS IN THE AMENDED COMPLAINT SHOW THAT THE PARTIES DID NOT HAVE A MODIFICATION AGREEMENT. FURTHER, PLAINTIFF DOES NOT PROPERLY ALLEGE TENDER. ACCORDINGLY, PLAINTIFF'S 1ST, 2ND & 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION FAIL. PLAINTIFF CANNOT ALLEGE A FIDUCIARY RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN THE PARTIES OR ALTERNATIVE FACTS TO SUPPORT A CONSTRUCTIVE FRAUD CAUSE OF ACTION. DEMURRER TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PRAY FOR RESTITUTION. DEFENDANT TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-09-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT GMAC MORTGAGE, LLC'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Kamin Kamali, Esq. of Finkelstein & Kamali, LLP 650/343-4503 for pltf & opposing party; Erik Kemp, Esq. of Severson & Werson 677-5556 for deft & moving party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified: DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 1ST, 2ND, 4TH & 5TH CAUSES OF ACTION. THE ALLEGATIONS IN THE AMENDED COMPLAINT SHOW THAT THE PARTIES DID NOT HAVE A MODIFICATION AGREEMENT. FURTHER, PLAINTIFF DOES NOT PROPERLY ALLEGE TENDER. ACCORDINGLY, PLAINTIFF'S 1ST, 2ND & 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION FAIL. PLAINTIFF CANNOT ALLEGE A FIDUCIARY RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN THE PARTIES OR ALTERNATIVE FACTS TO SUPPORT A CONSTRUCTIVE FRAUD CAUSE OF ACTION. DEMURRER TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PRAY FOR RESTITUTION. Defendant to prepare a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Defendant Gmac Mortgage Llc'S Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-29-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jonah S. Van Zandt, Esq., Severson & Werson, 415-398-3344; for Defendant and moving party: GMAC Mortgage, LLC, A Delaware Limited Liability Company
Kamin Kamali, Esq., Law Offices of David G. Finkelstein, 650-353-4503, for Plaintiff and opposing party: Florentino Villanueva

Argued. The court adopts its tentative ruling.
Defendant Gmac Mortgage Llc'S Demurrer To Complaint. Overruled as the Second cause of action. Sustained with 10 days leave to amend as to the First, 3rd. and 4th. causes of action. For the First cause of action (wrongful foreclosure) plaintiff must state facts showing that the foreclosure was wrongful and must allege tender. For the 3rd. cause of action . (Violations of the UCL) plaintiff must allege which prong he asserts the cause of action under and describe with reasonable particularity the facts supporting the alleged violation. For the 4th. cause of action (Quiet Title) plaintiff must allege tender and the title of plaintiff as to which determination is sought. Moving party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR #12353
